name: AJ Dybantsa
profile_text: AJ Dybantsa is a dynamic three-level scoring wing with elite physical tools. At 6'9 with a near 7-foot wingspan, he combines guard-like fluidity with forward strength. Led NCAA in scoring as a freshman at BYU, dominating via self-created midrange jumpers and relentless rim pressure. Drew more fouls than any player in the nation with advanced footwork and body control. Excels in pick-and-roll and post-up situations (87th and 94th percentile per Synergy). Only 23% of his rim attempts were assisted — a true go-to scorer. Defensively flashes plus potential with length and lateral mobility but effort wavers off-ball. Three-point shot has a flat arc (33-34%) and is the primary swing skill. Highest ceiling in the class — compares to Tracy McGrady or Jayson Tatum when fully engaged. Projects as a heliocentric high-usage NBA wing if handle tightens and shot arc improves.
profile_text_cn: AJ·迪班萨是一名具备精英级身体天赋的动态三威胁得分型侧翼。身高6尺9寸（约2.06米），臂展接近7尺（约2.13米），兼具后卫般的流畅性与前锋的力量感。在杨百翰大学的大一赛季领跑NCAA得分榜，凭借自主创造的中距离跳投与 relentless 的篮下冲击力统治比赛。凭借精湛的脚步与身体控制能力，其造犯规次数领跑全美。在挡拆与背身单打中表现卓越（Synergy数据分别位列第87与第94百分位）。其篮下出手仅23%来自助攻——是名副其实的持球核心型得分手。防守端凭借身高臂展与横向移动能力展现出正向潜力，但无球防守专注度存在波动。三分投射弧线偏平（命中率33-34%），是决定其上限的关键技术环节。本届选秀天花板最高——全力投入时可比拟特雷西·麦克格雷迪或杰森·塔图姆。若控运技术进一步精进且投篮弧度改善，有望发展为持球大核型高使用率NBA侧翼。

name: Darryn Peterson
profile_text: Darryn Peterson is the most polished three-level scoring guard in the 2026 class. At Kansas, he averaged 20+ PPG on elite efficiency (47% FG, 38-41% 3PT, 83% FT) with picture-perfect shot mechanics. Thrives both on and off the ball — lethal catch-and-shoot player who can also create pull-up separation with a tight handle. Devastating in transition and makes consistently good decisions in the open floor. Flashed real defensive impact with blocks and steals when engaged (4 blocks vs St. John's). Has prototypical two-guard dimensions at 6'5 with near 6'10 wingspan. The health file is the single biggest red flag — played only 17-20 games at Kansas due to injuries, illness, and a pre-season hospitalization. Hamstring issues have lingered since high school. Motor and body language can appear nonchalant at times. Post-injury explosiveness is still being evaluated by scouts. Compares stylistically to Devin Booker or Shai Gilgeous-Alexander if health permits.
profile_text_cn: 达林·彼得森是2026届最全面的三级别得分后卫。在堪萨斯大学期间，他场均砍下20+分且效率极高（投篮命中率47%，三分命中率38-41%，罚球命中率83%），投篮动作堪称教科书级别。他既能持球也能无球——是致命的接球投篮手，也能凭借扎实的运球创造急停跳投空间。转换进攻中极具破坏力，在开放球场总能做出正确决策。防守端偶露峥嵘，专注时能送出盖帽和抢断（对阵圣约翰大学贡献4次封盖）。拥有标准二号位身材：身高6尺5寸，臂展接近6尺10寸。最大的隐患是健康状况——在堪萨斯仅出战17-20场比赛，因伤病、疾病及季前住院缺席。腿筋问题自高中时期便反复发作。比赛动力和肢体语言有时显得漫不经心。伤后爆发力仍在接受球探评估。若健康允许，风格模板可比拟德文·布克或谢伊·吉尔杰斯-亚历山大。

name: Cameron Boozer
profile_text: Cameron Boozer is the most decorated and college-ready prospect in the 2026 class — National Player of the Year as a Duke freshman. A fundamentally sound two-way forward with the polish of a 10-year pro, he blends old-school interior scoring with modern stretch ability (39-40% from three). Elite basketball IQ is his calling card — processes double teams instantly, delivers pinpoint passes out of the post and short roll, and was Duke's go-to offensive hub (4.1 APG). High-end positional rebounder using strength and positioning rather than pure vertical athleticism. Son of former NBA All-Star Carlos Boozer, he has won at every level (4 state titles, 2 USA gold medals, 3 Peach Jam titles). The primary concern is athletic ceiling — not explosive, a below-the-rim finisher who struggles early against length before adjusting his approach. Between positions at 6'9 — undersized for a full-time center, lacking elite verticality as a rim protector. Compares to Bam Adebayo or Al Horford: safe, high-floor starter with All-Star upside if the athletic limitations are overstated.
profile_text_cn: 卡梅隆·布泽尔是2026届最受赞誉、最具备大学即战力的新秀——作为杜克大学大一新生便荣膺全国年度最佳球员。这位技术全面的锋线球员拥有十年职业老将般的成熟度，将古典内线终结能力与现代投射技术完美融合（三分命中率39-40%）。超凡的篮球智商是他的招牌特质：能瞬间破解包夹防守，在低位和短挡拆中送出精准传球，成为杜克进攻体系的绝对核心（场均4.1次助攻）。凭借力量与卡位意识而非纯粹弹跳，他成为顶级位置篮板手。作为前NBA全明星卡洛斯·布泽尔之子，他在各级别赛事中屡获殊荣（4次州冠军、2枚美国男篮金牌、3次Peach Jam锦标赛冠军）。主要短板在于运动天赋上限——缺乏爆发力，属于篮筐以下终结者，早期面对长人防守时表现挣扎，需调整打法适应。身高6尺9寸（约2.06米）的定位尴尬：全职中锋体型偏小，护框时缺乏顶级弹跳优势。模板可比巴姆·阿德巴约或艾尔·霍福德：安全系数高、下限稳固的首发球员，若运动能力短板被高估，则具备全明星潜力。

name: Caleb Wilson
profile_text: Caleb Wilson is an explosive, high-motor two-way forward with outlier athleticism at 6'9. Averaged 19.8 PPG and 9.4 RPG as a UNC freshman while generating elite stocks (top-10 in both Block% and Steal% among freshmen). Relentless on the glass with a 22.2% defensive rebound rate. Draws fouls at a high rate and finishes with authority in transition. Midrange flashes and free-throw rate suggest shooting upside that could unlock a dynamic face-up game. Defensive technique is the major work in progress — struggles switching onto the perimeter, loses focus off-ball, and is often late on closeouts. UNC's team defense suffered because of his inconsistencies. Lateral quickness needs development. Consensus top-4 pick with the highest two-way ceiling behind Dybantsa — if the defensive IQ catches up to the tools, he has genuine star potential. Compares to a young Pascal Siakam or Chris Bosh.
profile_text_cn: 凯莱布·威尔逊是一名爆发力十足、动力强劲的锋线双向球员，身高6尺9寸（约2.06米）却拥有超凡的运动天赋。作为北卡罗来纳大学大一新生，他场均贡献19.8分和9.4个篮板，同时展现出精英级别的防守数据——盖帽率和抢断率均位列大一新生前十。他凭借22.2%的防守篮板率在篮板拼抢上势不可挡，造犯规能力出众，转换进攻中终结极具统治力。中距离投射的闪光点与罚球命中率暗示其投篮潜力，有望解锁更具威胁的面筐进攻。防守技术是主要短板——换防至外线时挣扎，无球时注意力涣散，且经常在扑防外线时反应迟缓。北卡的团队防守因他的不稳定性而受损。横移速度仍需打磨。作为仅次于迪班萨的顶级双向潜力新秀，他被视为前四顺位热门——若防守智商能匹配其身体天赋，他具备真正的球星潜质。模板对标年轻时的帕斯卡尔·西亚卡姆或克里斯·波什。

name: Nate Ament
profile_text: Nate Ament is the ultimate boom-or-bust prospect — a 6'10 forward with rare wing-like mobility and legitimate three-level scoring upside. Fluid athlete with smooth touch around the basket and defensive versatility to guard multiple positions. Averaged 17.7 PPG and 6.4 RPG as a Tennessee freshman. High basketball IQ and plus positional size make him an intriguing modern forward. However, he is extremely raw physically — needs significant strength gain to handle NBA physicality. Lacks an explosive first step, leading to too many contested midrange jumpers. Shot just 33% from three and struggled in big moments (2-of-12 vs Michigan in the NCAA Tournament). Opposite of Boozer — physically underdeveloped but tools-rich. Comparisons to a young Kevin Durant are premature but hint at the ceiling if everything clicks. Likely requires 2-3 years of development before contributing at an NBA level but could be a top-5 player in a redraft.
profile_text_cn: 内特·阿门特是典型的"不成功便成仁"型新秀——这位身高6尺10的前锋拥有罕见的侧翼级机动性，以及货真价实的三个得分区域终结潜力。他具备流畅的运动能力，篮下手感柔和，防守端能换防多个位置。在田纳西大学的大一赛季场均贡献17.7分6.4篮板。高球商加上同位置球员中出众的身材优势，使他成为极具吸引力的现代前锋。然而他的身体素质极为稚嫩——需要大幅增强力量才能适应NBA级别的对抗。缺乏爆发力十足的第一步，导致过多强行中距离跳投。三分命中率仅33%，关键战役表现挣扎（NCAA锦标赛对阵密歇根大学12投2中）。与布泽尔截然相反——身体尚未发育成熟但天赋储备丰厚。与年轻版凯文·杜兰特的比较虽为时过早，却暗示着若一切顺利所能触及的天花板。预计需要2-3年培养才能达到NBA轮换水准，但在重排选秀中可能跻身前五顺位。

name: Mikel Brown Jr.
profile_text: Mikel Brown Jr. is a crafty lead guard who blends scoring and playmaking at a high level. One of the shiftiest ball-handlers in the class with a deep bag of dribble moves to create separation. At Louisville he ran the offense with poise, making advanced reads in pick-and-roll and finding shooters on the move. Good but not elite athlete — compensates with change of pace, deceleration, and body control rather than pure burst. Three-point shooting is solid (36-38%) and projects well to the NBA line with clean mechanics. Defensively competes but lacks elite length to consistently disrupt. Compares stylistically to a Mike Conley or Malcolm Brogdon type — steady, intelligent, reliable. Projected as a lottery pick who could start for a decade without being a superstar. Plus intangibles and leadership qualities separate him from pure scorers at the position.
profile_text_cn: 迈克·布朗二世是一名技巧型控球后卫，能将得分与组织能力高度结合。作为本届最灵动的持球手之一，他拥有丰富的运球技巧库来创造进攻空间。在路易斯维尔大学期间，他以沉稳的姿态掌控进攻，在挡拆中做出高级阅读，并能找到移动中的射手。身体素质良好但非顶级——他通过节奏变化、减速能力和身体控制来弥补爆发力的不足。三分投射稳定（命中率36-38%），凭借干净的出手动作有望适应NBA三分线。防守端具备竞争意识，但缺乏精英级别的臂展来持续干扰对手。风格模板接近迈克·康利或马尔科姆·布罗格登——稳健、睿智、可靠。预计为乐透秀，虽非超级巨星但可担任十年首发。超越纯得分手的无形价值与领导力，使他在同位置球员中脱颖而出。

name: Darius Acuff
profile_text: Darius Acuff is an explosive point guard who combines elite end-to-end speed with an aggressive scoring mentality. Posted the fastest 3/4 sprint time at the combine (3.06s, tied for 1st) and uses that burst to pressure defenses in transition and blow by defenders in the halfcourt. At Arkansas he was a high-volume offensive engine who can get into the paint at will. Solid shooter off the dribble with deep range, though shot selection can be questionable. The major red flag is defense — Acuff himself has made concerning comments about his defensive engagement, and film shows frequent lapses in effort and fundamentals. Teams drafting him are betting the offensive dynamism outweighs the defensive indifference. Ceiling is a high-scoring lead guard in the Darius Garland mold; floor is a spark-plug sixth man who gets hunted on defense.
profile_text_cn: 达柳斯·阿库夫是一名爆发力十足的组织后卫，兼具从端到端的顶级速度与侵略性得分心态。他在联合试训中跑出最快的3/4场冲刺速度（3.06秒，并列第一），并利用这一爆发力在转换进攻中施压防守，在半场阵地战中突破过掉防守人。在阿肯色大学期间，他是高使用率的进攻引擎，能够随心所欲杀入禁区。具备运球投篮能力，射程覆盖三分线外，但投篮选择有时值得商榷。最大的隐患在于防守——阿库夫本人曾发表过关于防守投入度的令人担忧的言论，而比赛录像也显示他在防守努力度和基本功方面频繁出现松懈。选择他的球队赌的是其进攻爆发力足以弥补防守端的漠不关心。上限是达柳斯·加兰式的高得分主控手；下限则是防守端会被追着打的替补第六人。

name: Kingston Flemings
profile_text: Kingston Flemings is an elite two-way athlete at the point guard position with freakish explosive testing numbers. Despite a modest 6'2.5 frame and below-average wingspan, he posted a 40.5-inch max vertical (3rd among guards), a 2.69s shuttle run (2nd overall), and a 10.61s lane agility (4th overall) at the 2026 combine. At Houston he was a disruptive on-ball defender who pressures full-court and generates turnovers with quick hands and elite lateral movement. Offensively more of a slasher than a pure point guard — attacks the rim fearlessly and finishes through contact despite his size. Playmaking is functional but not elite; projects more as a secondary ball-handler next to a larger creator. Jump shot is the swing skill — mechanics are workable but inconsistent. Compares to a young Kyle Lowry or Jevon Carter defensively with more vertical pop. Top-10 projection on the strength of athleticism and defensive floor.
profile_text_cn: 金斯顿·弗莱明斯是一名具备精英级双向运动能力的控球后卫，其爆发力测试数据堪称惊人。尽管身高仅6英尺2.5英寸（约1.89米）且臂展低于平均水平，他在2026年联合试训中仍交出40.5英寸（约103厘米）最大垂直弹跳（后卫第3）、2.69秒折返跑（总第2）及10.61秒敏捷性测试（总第4）的亮眼成绩单。效力休斯顿大学期间，他是一名极具破坏力的持球防守者——全场紧逼施压，凭借快手与顶级横移能力制造失误。进攻端更偏向突破型而非纯控卫：无畏冲击篮筐，即便身材受限仍能对抗完成终结。组织能力实用但非顶级，更适合作为大尺寸持球核心身边的副攻手。跳投是决定其上限的关键技术——投篮机制尚可但稳定性不足。防守端模板可类比年轻版凯尔·洛瑞或杰文·卡特，但垂直爆发力更胜一筹。凭借运动天赋与防守基本盘，预计乐透区（前10顺位）被选中。

name: Keaton Wagler
profile_text: Keaton Wagler is a sharpshooting off-guard who profiles as an elite NBA floor spacer. At Illinois he showcased one of the purest shooting strokes in the class — quick release, high arc, comfortable firing off movement, and dangerous from well beyond the NBA line. Projects as a 40%+ three-point shooter at the next level. Off the dribble he's functional but not dynamic; his game is built around relocation, screens, and catch-and-shoot gravity rather than self-creation. Solid positional defender who competes and stays in front but lacks elite physical tools to be a true stopper. Playmaking is limited — not a secondary creator, purely a finisher. The shooting is so elite that he projects as a lottery pick in a league desperate for premium floor spacing. Compares to a taller Sam Merrill or a poor-man's Klay Thompson in offensive role. Safe pick with a defined role who raises any team's offensive ceiling immediately.
profile_text_cn: 基顿·瓦格勒是一名投射精准的得分后卫，其定位堪称精英级NBA空间点。在伊利诺伊大学期间，他展现出本届最纯粹的投篮动作之一——出手迅捷、弧度高挑、擅长接球移动投篮，且射程远超NBA三分线。预测其进入职业赛场后三分命中率可达40%以上。持球进攻方面虽具备基本能力但缺乏爆发力，比赛风格更依赖无球跑位、掩护配合以及接球投篮的牵制力，而非自主创造得分机会。防守端属于扎实的位置型防守者，能保持对抗并跟防对手，但缺乏顶级身体天赋成为真正的外线铁闸。组织能力有限——并非第二进攻发起点，纯属终结型球员。其投射能力已臻化境，在当今极度渴求优质空间点的联盟中，足以锁定乐透区席位。技术模板可比肩更高大的萨姆·梅里尔，或进攻端弱化版的克莱·汤普森。作为功能明确的稳妥选择，能立即提升任何球队的进攻上限。

name: Koa Peat
profile_text: Koa Peat is a powerfully built bully-ball forward who overwhelms opponents with strength and physicality. At Arizona he averaged 22.8 PPG and 9.9 RPG playing mostly as an undersized power forward, using his 235-pound frame to carve out deep position and finish through contact. Excellent rebounder who pursues the ball with violence on both ends. Solid playmaker for his position (4.0 APG), showing willingness to kick out of double teams. The concerns are modern NBA fit — at 6'7 he's a classic tweener. Perimeter shooting is streaky and unreliable, making it hard to play him at the three. Defensively, the 3.39s shuttle run (slowest at the combine) raises serious lateral mobility questions for guarding wings. Needs to either develop a reliable three-point shot to play the four in small-ball lineups or slim down to guard wings. Comparisons to a more athletic David West or a stronger Grant Williams. Productive college player whose NBA translation depends entirely on skill development.
profile_text_cn: 科阿·皮特是一名力量型强力前锋，凭借强悍的身体对抗碾压对手。在亚利桑那大学期间，他场均贡献22.8分和9.9个篮板，主要担任身材偏矮的大前锋，依靠235磅的体重卡住深位并完成对抗下的终结。他是一名出色的篮板手，在攻防两端都极具侵略性地拼抢篮板。作为同位置球员，他的组织能力不俗（场均4.0次助攻），展现出遭遇包夹后向外分球的意愿。其隐患在于现代NBA的适配性——身高6尺7寸的他属于典型的"不三不四"球员。外线投射起伏不定且不可靠，这使他难以胜任小前锋位置。防守端，3.39秒的折返跑成绩（联合试训最慢）暴露出防守侧翼时横向移动能力的严重问题。他要么开发出可靠的三分投射以在小球阵容中担任大前锋，要么减重以防守侧翼。风格对比：运动能力更强的大卫·韦斯特或体型更壮的格兰特·威廉姆斯。作为大学时期的高产球员，其NBA前景完全取决于技术发展。

name: Chris Cenac Jr.
profile_text: Chris Cenac Jr. possesses the most mouthwatering physical tools among center prospects in the 2026 class — a near-7'5 wingspan on a mobile 6'10 frame with 9.25-inch hands. At Houston he thrived as a lob threat, transition rim-runner, and elite offensive rebounder, leading all qualifying freshmen in defensive rebound rate (26.8 DREB%). Flashed three-point potential (33.3%) that could transform him into a modern stretch-five if it develops. Most agile center prospect in the class — moves like a wing in the open floor. The red flag is rim protection — averaged only 0.5 blocks per game despite the enormous wingspan, suggesting poor timing or defensive instincts. Offensive game is almost entirely derived from putbacks, lobs, and rim runs with limited post skill. Houston's defensive system should translate well to NBA principles. Compares physically to a DeAndre Jordan-type athlete with more shooting upside. Mid-to-late first round pick who could massively outperform draft slot if the tools coalesce.
profile_text_cn: 克里斯·塞纳克二世是2026届中锋新秀中身体天赋最为诱人的存在——他拥有接近7英尺5英寸的臂展，搭配6英尺10英寸的机动型身材，以及9.25英寸的手掌尺寸。在休斯顿大学效力期间，他作为空接威胁、快攻顺下终结者和顶级进攻篮板手大放异彩，防守篮板率（26.8%）领跑所有合格大一新生。他展现出三分投射潜力（命中率33.3%），若持续开发，有望转型为现代空间型五号位。作为本届最敏捷的中锋新秀，他在开放空间中的移动能力堪比侧翼球员。隐患在于护框表现——尽管拥有惊人臂展，场均仅0.5次封盖，暴露出时机判断或防守直觉的短板。进攻手段几乎完全依赖二次进攻、空接和快下顺下，低位技术有限。休斯顿大学的防守体系与NBA理念高度契合。身体模板接近德安德烈·乔丹这类运动型中锋，但投射潜力更胜一筹。预计在首轮中后段被选中，若天赋全面兑现，其表现可能大幅超越选秀顺位预期。

name: Brayden Burries
profile_text: Brayden Burries is a powerfully built combo guard with a strong, NFL-running-back frame at 215 pounds. Uses his strength to bully smaller guards on drives and finish through contact at the rim. At Arizona he was a tough shot-maker who embraces physicality on both ends. Explosive leaper — posted a 35-inch standing vertical (top-5 at the combine) and 10.59s lane agility time, demonstrating the rare combination of power and quickness. Defensively he competes hard and can guard up a position thanks to his strength. The question is NBA offensive role — he's a score-first guard who doesn't project as a primary creator and hasn't shown elite playmaking vision. Shooting is solid but not elite. Projects as a high-energy two-way rotation guard in the Marcus Smart mold — someone who impacts winning through physicality, defense, and timely scoring rather than high-usage creation.
profile_text_cn: 布雷登·伯里斯是一名体格强壮的双能卫，拥有215磅堪比NFL跑卫的健硕身板。他擅长利用力量优势碾压小个子后卫突破上篮，并在对抗中完成终结。在亚利桑那大学期间，他是一名擅长强投的得分手，攻防两端都展现出硬朗作风。作为爆发力惊人的弹跳者——其35英寸原地起跳高度（联合试训前五）与10.59秒的折返跑速度，印证了力量与敏捷性的罕见结合。防守端他拼劲十足，凭借强壮体魄能向上换防多个位置。其NBA进攻角色定位存疑：作为得分优先型后卫，他并非天生的进攻发起者，也未展现出精英级组织视野。投射能力扎实但未达顶级水准。预计他将成为马库斯·斯马特式的高能量双向轮换后卫——通过强悍对抗、防守韧性与关键得分影响比赛，而非依赖高使用率的持球创造。

name: Cameron Carr
profile_text: Cameron Carr is the biggest combine riser of the 2026 draft cycle, posting historic athletic testing numbers that boosted his stock from fringe first round to potential lottery. Measured with a staggering +8 inch wingspan differential (6'4.5 barefoot with a 7'0.75 wingspan), then backed it up with a 42.5-inch max vertical (T-2nd), 38-inch standing vertical (2nd), and 10.46s lane agility (2nd overall). At Baylor he was an inconsistent but tantalizing two-way wing — flashes of elite shot-making and defensive disruption mixed with long stretches of passivity. The tools are undeniably first-round caliber; the production hasn't consistently matched. Shooting mechanics are clean and project well. Defensively the length and athleticism combination is elite — can realistically guard 1-3. The ultimate traits bet — if the feel and consistency catch up to the body, he's a top-10 talent in this class. If not, he's a toolsy rotation project. Compares to a raw Mikal Bridges or a smaller Herb Jones with more offensive upside.
profile_text_cn: 卡梅隆·卡尔是2026届选秀周期中联合试训的最大赢家，凭借历史级别的体测数据，其行情从首轮末段一路飙升至潜在乐透区。他拥有惊人的+8英寸臂展优势（赤脚身高6英尺4.5英寸，臂展7英尺0.75英寸），随后以42.5英寸最大垂直弹跳（并列第二）、38英寸原地起跳（第二）和10.46秒折返跑（总排名第二）进一步印证了天赋。在贝勒大学期间，他是一名表现起伏但极具吸引力的双向侧翼——时而展现精英级投篮创造力和防守破坏力，时而陷入长时间的被动状态。其身体天赋无疑达到首轮水准，但场上产出始终未能稳定匹配。投篮动作干净利落，投射潜力值得期待。防守端，他的身高臂展与运动能力组合堪称顶级——能真正实现1到3号位的换防。这是一场终极天赋赌注：若比赛感觉与稳定性追上身体条件，他将成为本届前10顺位的天才；若未能兑现，则沦为依赖身体素质的轮换培养项目。模板可参考技术粗糙版的米卡尔·布里奇斯，或进攻上限更高但体型稍小的赫伯特·琼斯。

name: Billy Richmond III
profile_text: Billy Richmond III is arguably the best pure athlete in the 2026 draft class — a 6'6 wing who posted the fastest lane agility time (10.23s, 1st), tied for fastest 3/4 sprint (3.06s), recorded a 41-inch max vertical, and had an elite 2.82s shuttle run at the combine. No other prospect matched his combination of speed, quickness, and leaping ability. At Arkansas he was a transition terror and disruptive defender who generates chaos with his physical tools. Offensively raw — scoring comes mostly in transition, on cuts, and off offensive rebounds. Half-court creation and shooting are major works in progress. The defensive upside is tantalizing — can credibly guard 1-4 with his combination of strength, length, and lateral quickness. Projects as a defensive specialist and transition weapon who needs significant offensive skill development. If the shot comes around, he's an All-Defense candidate. Compares to a young Andre Roberson with more athletic pop or a raw Herb Jones.
profile_text_cn: 比利·里士满三世无疑是2026届选秀中身体素质最出众的纯运动型球员——这位身高6尺6寸的锋线在联合试训中跑出最快禁区敏捷性测试成绩（10.23秒，排名第一），与最快3/4场冲刺成绩并列（3.06秒），同时录得41英寸最大垂直弹跳，以及精英级别的2.82秒折返跑数据。没有任何一位新秀能像他这样兼具速度、爆发力与弹跳能力。在阿肯色大学期间，他是转换进攻中的噩梦级存在，同时凭借身体天赋制造混乱的防守破坏者。进攻端仍显粗糙——得分主要来自快攻、空切和进攻篮板二次进攻。半场阵地创造机会能力和投射技术是亟待提升的重大课题。防守端潜力令人垂涎——凭借力量、臂展和横向移动速度的结合，他能有效防守1至4号位。预计将成长为防守专家兼转换进攻利器，但需要大幅打磨进攻技巧。若投射能力开发成功，他将成为最佳防守阵容候选人。球风可比肩运动能力更强的年轻版安德烈·罗伯森，或技术尚显粗糙的赫伯特·琼斯。

name: Morez Johnson Jr.
profile_text: Morez Johnson Jr. was the biggest winner of the 2026 combine, vaulting from fringe first round to potential lottery off the strength of his athletic testing and shooting display. A 6'9 power forward with a 7'3.5 wingspan and 251-pound frame, he moved like a guard in drills — 10.59s lane agility (2nd among forwards) and a 39-inch max vertical. Then he went out and hit 17-of-25 from the three-point star drill, showcasing shooting potential that wasn't evident in college. Won a national championship at Michigan as a key rotation piece. The college production (modest counting stats) undersells the impact — elite screen setter, physical defender, and high-energy rebounder who does dirty-work intangibles. Offensive game is basic — rolls hard to the rim, crashes the glass, finishes dump-offs. If the shooting is real, he becomes a starting-caliber stretch four with plus defense. If not, he's an energy big off the bench. Rising stock makes him a likely lottery pick.
profile_text_cn: 莫雷兹·约翰逊二世是2026年联合试训的最大赢家，凭借出色的体测数据和投篮表现，从首轮末段一路跃升至潜在乐透区。这位身高6尺9寸（2.06米）、臂展7尺3.5寸（2.22米）、体重251磅（114公斤）的大前锋，在训练中展现出后卫般的移动能力——折返跑10.59秒（前锋中第二），最大垂直弹跳39英寸（99厘米）。随后他在三分星形投篮测试中25投17中，展现出大学时期未曾显露的投射潜力。作为密歇根大学的关键轮换球员，他随队夺得全国冠军。大学期间平平的场均数据掩盖了他的实际影响力——顶级掩护质量、强硬防守、高能量篮板拼抢，以及那些数据无法体现的脏活累活。进攻手段相对基础：强力顺下攻筐、冲抢篮板、接应分球终结。若投射能力属实，他将成为具备首发实力的空间型四号位，附带优质防守；若投射存疑，则定位为替补能量型内线。持续飙升的选秀行情使其极有可能锁定乐透签位。

name: Karim Lopez
profile_text: Karim Lopez is the premier international prospect in the 2026 class — a 6'8 forward with guard skills developed in the NBL's Next Stars program with the New Zealand Breakers. Born in 2007, he's one of the youngest players in the draft with significant professional experience against grown men. Polished offensive game with a smooth shooting stroke, advanced footwork, and the ability to create his own shot off the dribble. Plays with a European-style feel — patient, reads defenses, makes the extra pass. Physically he's solid with a 222-pound frame that should hold up in the NBA. Defensively he's competitive but not elite — adequate lateral quickness but not a lockdown stopper. The NBL production was solid but not dominant, typical for a teenager playing against professionals. Compares to a young Danilo Gallinari or a less explosive Franz Wagner. High-floor international pick who could contribute immediately as a secondary creator and floor spacer.
profile_text_cn: 卡里姆·洛佩斯是2026届最顶尖的国际新秀——这位身高6尺8寸（约2.03米）的前锋，在新西兰破坏者队的NBL明日之星计划中磨炼出了后卫技术。2007年出生的他是本届选秀最年轻的球员之一，却已积累了与成年职业球员交手的丰富经验。进攻端技术全面，拥有流畅的投篮手感、精良的步法，以及运球创造投篮机会的能力。打法带有欧洲风格——沉着冷静，善于阅读防守，乐于多一次传球。身体条件扎实，222磅（约101公斤）的体重足以应对NBA对抗。防守端具备竞争力但并非顶尖——横向移动速度尚可，但算不上封锁型防守者。在NBL的表现虽不具统治力但足够扎实，这符合青少年对抗职业球员的常态。模板可参考年轻时的达尼罗·加里纳利或爆发力稍逊的弗朗茨·瓦格纳。作为高下限的国际球员，他能以第二持球点和空间拉开者的身份立即做出贡献。

name: Tounde Yessoufou
profile_text: Tounde Yessoufou is a powerfully built defensive-minded wing who brings elite energy and toughness to every possession. At St. John's he established himself as one of the best perimeter defenders in college basketball — capable of guarding 1-4 with a strong 210-pound frame, plus wingspan, and outstanding lateral movement (2.75s shuttle, top-5 at combine). Offensively he's limited — a straight-line driver who scores mostly in transition and on cuts. Three-point shot is below average and will determine his NBA role. The motor never stops — relentless offensive rebounder from the wing position, always the first to dive for loose balls. Comparisons to a young PJ Tucker or a less skilled Jimmy Butler defensively. If the corner three becomes reliable, he's a coveted 3-and-D rotation wing who brings physicality and attitude. If not, he's a specialist defender whose offensive limitations cap his ceiling. Late first to early second round grade with a clear path to NBA rotation.
profile_text_cn: 通德·耶苏福是一名体格强壮的防守型侧翼，每次持球都展现出顶级的能量与强硬作风。在圣约翰大学期间，他已成为大学篮坛最出色的外围防守者之一——凭借210磅的强壮身躯、出色臂展以及顶尖横向移动能力（2.75秒折返跑，联合试训前五），能够防守1至4号位。进攻端他存在局限——主要依靠直线突破，得分多来自转换进攻和空切。三分投射低于平均水准，这将决定他在NBA的角色定位。他的动力永不枯竭——作为侧翼球员，他是无情的进攻篮板手，总是第一个飞扑争夺地板球。防守端可比拟年轻时的PJ·塔克或技术稍逊的吉米·巴特勒。若底角三分变得可靠，他将成为兼具身体对抗与强硬态度的稀缺3D轮换侧翼；若投射不稳，则沦为进攻短板限制上限的防守专精球员。首轮末至次轮初的选秀行情，具备清晰的NBA轮换路径。

name: Aday Mara
profile_text: Aday Mara is a genetic outlier — a 7'3 center with the second-longest standing reach in NBA Draft Combine history at 9'9 (behind only Tacko Fall). The measurements are cartoonish and he leverages them effectively as a rim protector and lob finisher. Won a national championship at Michigan as a key defensive anchor. Excellent positional passer out of the post and short roll — sees over the defense and makes reads that smaller bigs can't. The athletic testing was historically bad — 24-inch standing vertical (worst), 28-inch max vertical (worst), 3.61s 3/4 sprint (worst). These are legitimate red flags for NBA mobility, particularly in pick-and-roll defense where he'll be targeted in space. The Enes Freedom/ Boban Marjanovic archetype is his likely outcome — a situational big who dominates in certain matchups but gets played off the floor in others. In an era where centers must defend in space, Mara's viability depends entirely on scheme fit and surrounding personnel. Late first round flier for a team betting the unicorn size outweighs the athletic limitations.
profile_text_cn: 阿代·马拉是一名基因层面的异类——身高7尺3寸（约2.21米），站立摸高达到9尺9寸（约2.97米），位列NBA联合试训历史第二（仅次于塔科·法尔）。他的身体数据堪称夸张，并有效利用这些优势成为护框手和空接终结者。在密歇根大学赢得全国冠军期间，他是球队的关键防守支柱。作为低位和短挡拆中的优秀传球手，他能越过防守观察全局，做出小个子内线无法完成的阅读判断。然而，他的运动能力测试数据堪称历史最差——原地垂直弹跳24英寸（约61厘米，最差）、最大垂直弹跳28英寸（约71厘米，最差）、四分之三场冲刺3.61秒（最差）。这些数据对NBA级别的移动能力构成重大隐患，尤其在挡拆防守中，他将在开阔空间成为被针对的目标。埃内斯·坎特/博班·马里亚诺维奇式的模板是他的大概率发展方向——一名在特定对位中能统治比赛、但在其他场景下会被迫离场的场景型内线。在当今中锋必须能防守外线的时代，马拉的生存价值完全取决于战术体系适配性和周围队友配置。他适合作为首轮末段的彩票选择，押注于独角兽级别的体型足以弥补运动能力的短板。

name: Jayden Quaintance
profile_text: Jayden Quaintance is a physically imposing center prospect with elite length — his 7'5.25 wingspan is the longest among all top prospects in the 2026 class. At Kentucky he was a dominant rebounder and shot blocker who anchored the paint with his sheer physical presence. Strong 253-pound frame allows him to hold position against any post scorer. Offensive game is extremely limited — almost entirely reliant on putbacks, lobs, and dump-offs. Zero shooting range and rudimentary post moves. The medical concerns are significant — multiple lower-body injuries have limited his career and there are questions about long-term durability for a player carrying 253 pounds with an explosive playing style. In a different era he'd be a lottery lock; in the modern NBA his fit depends on finding a team willing to play a traditional non-shooting five. Compares to a Bismack Biyombo or a less skilled Andre Drummond. Mid-second round grade based primarily on the medical flag.
profile_text_cn: 杰登·昆坦斯是一名身体条件出众的中锋新秀，拥有精英级别的臂展——其7英尺5.25英寸（约2.27米）的臂展在2026届所有顶尖新秀中位列最长。在肯塔基大学效力期间，他凭借纯粹的身体存在感成为统治级篮板手和盖帽手，牢牢镇守禁区。253磅（约115公斤）的强壮体格使他能够顶住任何低位得分手的背身强攻。进攻端极为有限——几乎完全依赖二次进攻补篮、空中接力扣篮和篮下喂球。毫无投射射程，低位技术也相当粗糙。医疗隐患不容忽视——多次下肢伤病已影响其职业生涯，对于一名体重253磅且打法极具爆发力的球员而言，长期耐用性存疑。若身处不同时代，他本应是乐透区锁定人选；但在现代NBA，他的适配性取决于能否找到一支愿意使用传统非投射型中锋的球队。模板可类比俾斯麦·比永博或技术稍逊的安德烈·德拉蒙德。基于医疗风险警示，目前评估为次轮中段选秀行情。

name: Andrej Stojakovic
profile_text: Andrej Stojakovic is a smooth scoring wing with deep basketball lineage — son of three-time NBA All-Star Peja Stojakovic. At California he was one of the most purely gifted scorers in the Pac-12, blending a silky shooting stroke with crafty off-the-dribble creation. Shot mechanics are near-identical to his father's — high release, quick trigger, comfortable firing off movement and from deep range. Showed significant improvement as a playmaker in his sophomore year, doubling his assist rate while cutting turnovers. The athletic testing at the combine was a pleasant surprise — posted a 41.5-inch max vertical (top-5 among wings), addressing concerns about his explosiveness. Defensively he's below average — lacks lateral quickness and defensive intensity, which was the knock on his father as well. Bulk and strength need work at 200 pounds. Projects as an offensive specialist — instant bench scorer who tilts defenses with gravity and can get hot in a hurry. Compares stylistically to a taller Buddy Hield or a poor-man's Tyler Herro. Mid-to-late first round pick.
profile_text_cn: 安德烈·斯托亚科维奇是一位技术流畅的得分型侧翼，拥有深厚的篮球血统——他是三届NBA全明星球员佩贾·斯托亚科维奇之子。在加州大学效力期间，他是Pac-12联盟中最具纯天赋的得分手之一，将丝滑的投篮手感与巧妙的持球创造能力融为一体。他的投篮机制与父亲几乎如出一辙——高出手点、快速释放、擅长在移动中及远距离开火。大二赛季作为组织者显著进步，助攻率翻倍的同时降低了失误。联合试训中的体测数据令人惊喜——最大垂直弹跳达到41.5英寸（侧翼球员中前五），回应了外界对其爆发力的质疑。防守端低于平均水准——缺乏横向移动速度和防守强度，这也是其父亲曾被诟病的短板。体重200磅需要增加肌肉与力量。定位为进攻型专家——能凭借投射威胁改变防守阵型、瞬间爆发的替补得分手。风格模板可类比更高大的巴迪·希尔德或低配版泰勒·希罗。预计在首轮中后段被选中。

name: Yaxel Lendeborg
profile_text: Yaxel Lendeborg is the most pro-ready prospect in the 2026 class — a 23-year-old national champion and consensus First-Team All-American who impacts winning in every facet. At Michigan he averaged 15.1 PPG, 6.8 RPG, 3.2 APG, 1.2 BPG, and 1.1 SPG while earning Big Ten Player of the Year and All-Defensive Team honors. An elite switchable defender with a 7-foot-4 wingspan who can legitimately guard 1-through-5, using length and IQ to disrupt passing lanes and contest without fouling (98th percentile in foul efficiency). Offensively he thrives as a low-usage, high-efficiency connector — knockdown catch-and-shoot threat (37% 3PT on 4.5 attempts/game), elite short-roll passer, and efficient rim finisher (51% FG). Won NCAA Tournament MOP after leading Michigan to the national title. Previously two-time AAC Defensive Player of the Year at UAB and NJCAA all-time leading rebounder at Arizona Western. The age (24 as a rookie) is the single biggest red flag — older than Brandon Miller, Cade Cunningham, and Scottie Barnes. Lacks self-creation and elite explosiveness, projecting more as a high-floor role player than a star. Compares to OG Anunoby or Aaron Gordon as a versatile two-way forward who contributes to winning immediately.
profile_text_cn: 亚克塞尔·伦德伯格是2026届最具备职业即战力的新秀——这位23岁的全国冠军、全美共识一阵球员，能在攻防两端全方位影响比赛胜负。在密歇根大学期间，他场均贡献15.1分、6.8篮板、3.2助攻、1.2盖帽和1.1抢断，荣膺十大联盟年度最佳球员并入选最佳防守阵容。作为拥有7英尺4英寸臂展的顶级换防型防守者，他能真正实现1到5号位的全面换防，凭借身高臂展与防守智商干扰传球路线，且犯规控制能力极佳（犯规效率位列第98百分位）。进攻端他擅长低使用率、高效率的衔接打法——接球投篮精准（场均4.5次三分出手命中率37%），短挡拆传球能力出众，篮下终结效率稳定（投篮命中率51%）。他率领密歇根大学夺得全国冠军并荣膺锦标赛MOP。此前在UAB两次当选AAC联盟最佳防守球员，在亚利桑那西部学院创下NJCAA历史篮板纪录。年龄（新秀赛季24岁）是最大隐患——比布兰登·米勒、凯德·坎宁安和斯科蒂·巴恩斯都年长。缺乏自主进攻能力和顶级爆发力，定位更偏向高地板角色球员而非明星。模板为OG·阿奴诺比或阿隆·戈登，属于能立即为胜利做出贡献的全能型锋线。

name: Meleek Thomas
profile_text: Meleek Thomas is one of the best pure shooters in the 2026 class — a 19-year-old Arkansas freshman who drilled 41.6% from three on high volume (5.3 attempts/game) and an absurd 48.7% from three in SEC play. Averaged 15.6 PPG, 3.8 RPG, 2.5 APG, and 1.5 SPG while playing alongside high-usage guard Darius Acuff. Elite movement shooter who hit 50% of his off-screen threes and 49.2% of pull-up threes — a lethal combination for modern NBA offenses. Possesses a quick, high-release stroke with deep range and smooth mechanics. Strong complementary player with an ultra-low 6.7% turnover rate (96th percentile) and a 2.5:1 AST/TO ratio. Active defensively (1.5 SPG, 10th in SEC) with quick hands and good lateral movement. The primary concern is finishing — converted just 39.3% of drives and lacks elite explosion to finish through contact at the rim. Slender frame at 189 pounds will get pushed around early. Projects more as a scoring 2-guard than a lead playmaker. Compares stylistically to Anfernee Simons or Tyler Herro as a movement shooter with starter upside. Mid-to-late first round pick.
profile_text_cn: 梅利克·托马斯是2026届最出色的纯射手之一——这位19岁的阿肯色大学大一新生，以高产量（场均5.3次出手）投出41.6%的三分命中率，在SEC联盟比赛中更是达到惊人的48.7%。他场均贡献15.6分、3.8篮板、2.5助攻和1.5抢断，与高使用率后卫达柳斯·阿库夫并肩作战。作为精英级移动射手，他接球掩护后三分命中率50%，急停干拔三分命中率49.2%——这对现代NBA进攻体系而言是致命组合。他拥有快速高出手点的投篮动作，射程深远且动作流畅。作为优秀的辅助型球员，他的失误率仅为6.7%（超过96%的球员），助攻失误比达到2.5:1。防守端活跃（场均1.5抢断，SEC联盟第10），具备快手和良好的横向移动能力。主要短板在于终结能力——突破上篮命中率仅39.3%，缺乏顶级爆发力以在对抗下完成篮下终结。189磅的瘦削体型在初期会遭遇力量压制。定位更偏向得分型二号位而非核心组织者。风格类比安芬尼·西蒙斯或泰勒·希罗，属于具备首发潜力的移动射手。预计在首轮中后段被选中。

name: Isaiah Evans
profile_text: Isaiah Evans is a microwave scorer and elite perimeter shooter out of Duke who earned ACC Sixth Man of the Year honors as a sophomore. Averaged 15.0 PPG on 36.1% from three (7.4 attempts/game) with a quick-release stroke and deep NBA range. Nicknamed "Baby Ingram" for his 6-foot-6 frame and near-6-foot-9 wingspan reminiscent of Brandon Ingram. Thrives as an off-screen movement shooter — runs off screens effectively, squares up instantly for catch-and-shoot threes, or curls into the mid-range for pull-ups (shot 44.7% on two-point jumpers). Dramatically improved his finishing from 14 rim baskets as a freshman to 64 as a sophomore. Career 38.0% three-point shooter over two seasons. Scored 20+ points 11 times including a career-high 34 vs. Virginia Tech, and averaged 18.9 PPG during Duke's NCAA Tournament run. The primary limitations are one-dimensionality — rarely impacts games outside scoring (3.2 RPG, 0.7 SPG, 8.3% assist rate). Posted a disappointing 27-inch standing vertical and the second-slowest lane agility time at the NBA Combine. Thin 186-pound frame raises physicality concerns. Projects as a valuable floor-spacing rotation piece in the Jordan Hawkins mold — plug-and-play shooting with limited self-creation. Mid-to-late first round pick.
profile_text_cn: 以赛亚·埃文斯是来自杜克大学的微波炉得分手和精英级外线射手，大二赛季荣膺ACC联盟最佳第六人。场均15.0分，三分命中率36.1%（场均出手7.4次），出手速度快且具备NBA射程。因其6英尺6英寸身高和接近6英尺9英寸的臂展酷似布兰登·英格拉姆，获称"小英格拉姆"。擅长无球掩护后的移动投射——高效利用掩护跑位，接球后迅速调整完成三分投篮，或切入中距离急停跳投（两分跳投命中率44.7%）。篮下终结能力大幅提升，从大一赛季的14次篮下进球增至大二赛季的64次。两个赛季三分命中率稳定在38.0%。11次砍下20+得分，其中对阵弗吉尼亚理工砍下生涯最高的34分，杜克大学NCAA锦标赛期间场均18.9分。主要短板在于功能单一——除得分外对比赛影响有限（场均3.2篮板、0.7抢断、8.3%助攻率）。NBA联合试训中暴露出27英寸原地起跳高度和倒数第二的折返跑速度。186磅的瘦弱体型引发对抗能力担忧。定位为乔丹·霍金斯类型的空间型轮换球员——即插即用的投射能力，自主进攻能力有限。预计在首轮中后段被选中。

name: Christian Anderson
profile_text: Christian Anderson Jr. is arguably the best shooter in the 2026 class — a FIBA-proven, pick-and-roll maestro out of Texas Tech with deep range and lightning-quick release. Averaged 18.5 PPG and 7.4 APG (5th in NCAA) as a sophomore while earning Third-Team All-American and Big 12 Most Improved Player honors. Shot 41.5% from three on 7.9 attempts per game and an elite 41.7% on pull-up threes. One of the most decorated international youth players ever — led Germany to four FIBA podium finishes including U18 EuroBasket gold (2024) and U19 World Cup silver (2025), earning All-Star Five honors at three tournaments. Dennis Schröder has endorsed him as his eventual successor on the German national team. Processes pick-and-roll at an advanced level — burns drop coverage with pull-ups, beats hedges with pocket passes, and makes third-level reads. Led the Big 12 in assists with excellent decision-making. The primary concern is size — at 6-foot-1 and 180 pounds, he will be targeted on defense and has no path to guarding anything but point guards. Attempted only 3.4 shots at the rim per 100 possessions (9th percentile), relying almost entirely on his jumper. Projects as a high-floor backup PG in the Payton Pritchard mold — instant offense, elite shooting, pick-and-roll command. Mid-to-late first round.
profile_text_cn: 克里斯蒂安·安德森二世无疑是2026届选秀中最出色的射手——这位来自德克萨斯理工大学的挡拆大师已在FIBA赛场证明自己，拥有超远射程和闪电般的出手速度。大二赛季场均贡献18.5分和7.4次助攻（NCAA助攻榜第五），荣膺全美第三阵容和Big 12赛区最快进步球员。三分命中率高达41.5%（场均出手7.9次），急停三分命中率更是达到精英级别的41.7%。作为国际青年赛事史上成就最辉煌的球员之一——率领德国队四次站上FIBA领奖台，包括U18欧锦赛金牌（2024）和U19世界杯银牌（2025），三次入选赛事最佳阵容。丹尼斯·施罗德已公开表示他是自己在德国国家队的理想接班人。挡拆处理达到高级水准——用急停跳投惩罚沉退防守，以击地传球破解延误，并具备第三层阅读能力。凭借出色的决策能力领跑Big 12助攻榜。主要隐患在于身材——身高1米85、体重82公斤的体型将在防守端成为针对目标，除控卫外几乎无法防守任何位置。每百回合仅3.4次篮下出手（第九百分位），进攻几乎完全依赖跳投。模板为佩顿·普里查德式的高下限替补控卫——即战力得分、精英投射、挡拆掌控力。预计首轮中后段被选中。
nameCn: 克里斯蒂安·安德森二世

name: Bennett Stirtz
profile_text: Bennett Stirtz is one of the best pick-and-roll operators and toughest shot-makers in the 2026 class — a cerebral guard who climbed from Division II to Drake to Iowa, leading the Hawkeyes to the Elite Eight as a No. 9 seed. Averaged 19.8 PPG, 4.4 APG, and 1.4 SPG while playing 37.7 MPG (led nation). Elite shot-making versatility — 40.2% on all jump shots including 48.2% on catch-and-shoot opportunities. His off-the-dribble jumpers rated in the 97.4th percentile in frequency while maintaining 83.7th percentile efficiency. Graded in the 91st percentile as a pick-and-roll ball-handler per Synergy, with advanced understanding of angles, timing, and positioning. Shot an outstanding 69.9% at the rim despite athletic limitations, using crafty finishes, floaters, and body control. Excellent 2.40 AST/TO ratio. The primary red flag is athleticism — lacks blow-by explosiveness, end-to-end speed, and vertical pop, which shows against elite competition (25.6% from three in NCAA Tournament, 36.9% overall in four tournament games). Will be nearly 23 as a rookie, capping perceived upside. Defensive concerns due to athletic limitations. Compares to Payton Pritchard — an older, undersized guard who compensates with elite craft, IQ, and competitive toughness. High-floor backup PG with sixth-man potential. Mid-to-late first round.
profile_text_cn: 贝内特·斯蒂尔茨是2026届选秀中最出色的挡拆持球手和最坚韧的投篮创造者之一——这位球商出众的后卫从二级联赛一路升至德雷克大学，最终加盟爱荷华大学，并以9号种子身份率领鹰眼队闯入精英八强。场均贡献19.8分、4.4次助攻和1.4次抢断，同时以37.7分钟的上场时间领跑全美。具备精英级投篮多样性——跳投命中率达40.2%，其中接球投篮命中率高达48.2%。其运球投篮频率位列联盟前2.6%，同时保持前16.3%的效率。根据Synergy数据，作为挡拆持球人评分位列前9%，对角度、时机和站位有着超前的理解。尽管运动能力受限，仍凭借巧妙的终结手法、抛投和身体控制，在篮下交出69.9%的出色命中率。助攻失误比达到优秀的2.40。主要隐患在于运动能力——缺乏一步过人的爆发力、全场推进速度和弹跳高度，这在面对顶级对手时暴露无遗（NCAA锦标赛三分命中率25.6%，四场淘汰赛整体命中率36.9%）。新秀赛季将年近23岁，限制了潜在成长空间。防守端因运动能力短板存在隐忧。模板对标佩顿·普里查德——一位年龄偏大、身高不足的后卫，凭借精英级技术、球商和竞争韧性弥补短板。高地板替补控卫，具备第六人潜力。预计首轮中后段被选中。

name: Labaron Philon Jr.
profile_text: Labaron Philon Jr. became the first power-conference player since 2000 to average 21+ points, 4+ assists, and shoot over 50% from the field — an absurdly efficient sophomore campaign at Alabama that earned him consensus Third-Team All-American honors. Averaged 22.0 PPG (3rd in SEC), 5.0 APG (4th in SEC), and shot 50.1% FG / 39.9% 3PT (6.3 attempts/game). Possesses a herky-jerky, unorthodox driving style with advanced ball-handling — gets to his spots at will with in-and-out dribbles, step-backs, and floaters. True three-level scorer who thrived both as an off-ball connector (freshman year) and lead creator (sophomore year). Walking good decision-maker with heads-up, team-first vision. Green room invitee projected in the late lottery to early 20s. The swing factor is physical — very slight at ~185 pounds with disappointing combine testing (35-inch max vertical is below-average for a sub-6-foot-3 lottery guard). Defensive impact waned as offensive usage spiked, raising questions about two-way balance. Below-the-rim athlete who relies on craft and change-of-pace rather than burst. Some teams see him as more scoring-focused than a natural table-setter. Compares to Dejounte Murray — a scoring-minded combo guard with length and craft. Projects as a high-floor offensive player with star upside if the frame fills out.
profile_text_cn: 拉巴隆·菲隆二世成为自2000年以来首位场均21+分、4+助攻且命中率超过50%的顶级联盟球员——在阿拉巴马大学堪称荒谬高效的二年级赛季，为他赢得了全美第三阵容的一致认可。场均22.0分（SEC联盟第三）、5.0次助攻（SEC第四），投篮命中率50.1%，三分命中率39.9%（场均出手6.3次）。拥有不连贯、非正统的突破风格，控球技术先进——通过内外运球、后撤步和抛投随心所欲地到达自己的进攻位置。真正的三威胁得分手，无论是作为无球衔接点（大一赛季）还是主要创造者（大二赛季）都表现出色。天生的优秀决策者，具备警觉且以团队为先的传球视野。受邀进入绿屋候选名单，预计在乐透末段至首轮20顺位左右被选中。关键变数在于身体条件——体重仅约185磅，体测表现令人失望（35英寸最大垂直弹跳对于身高不足6英尺3英寸的乐透后卫而言低于平均水平）。随着进攻使用率飙升，防守影响力有所下降，引发对其攻守平衡的质疑。低于篮筐水平的运动能力，更多依赖技巧和节奏变化而非爆发力。部分球队认为他更偏向得分型而非天然组织者。模板为德章泰·穆雷——一名具备身高和技巧的得分型双能卫。若身体框架能充实起来，有望成为进攻端高下限、具备球星上限的球员。

name: Alex Karaban
profile_text: Alex Karaban is the ultimate winning role player — a four-year UConn starter who led the program to three Final Fours, two national championships, and holds all-time UConn records for wins (126), games played (151), starts (150), minutes, and three-pointers made. Averaged 13.2 PPG, 5.3 RPG, 2.4 APG on 46.4% FG / 37.4% 3PT / 85.1% FT as a senior. Elite off-ball shooter who ranked in the 99th percentile in off-screen usage per Synergy — quick trigger, high release, comfortable on catch-and-shoot, spot-ups, and movement threes. Savvy cutter who uses shooting gravity to back-door defenders with elite timing and body control. Rarely makes mistakes — just 7.4% turnover rate as a senior with connective passing and smart decision-making. Inducted into UConn's Huskies of Honor while still active. The athletic limitations are severe — lacks foot speed, lateral quickness, and explosiveness. Shot just 32.5% in transition and had only 8 drives to the basket all senior season. Scored just 8 isolation points in four years. Rival coaches anonymously criticized his defense heavily. Compares almost exactly to Sam Hauser (identical 6-foot-6.75 barefoot measurements, with Karaban slightly longer at 6-foot-11 wingspan). Late first to second round floor-spacing specialist who contributes immediately.
profile_text_cn: 亚历克斯·卡拉班是终极赢家型角色球员——这位康涅狄格大学四年首发核心带领球队三次闯入最终四强、两度夺得全国冠军，并保持着校史胜场数（126场）、出场数（151场）、首发次数（150次）、出场时间及三分命中数等多项历史纪录。大四赛季场均贡献13.2分、5.3篮板、2.4助攻，三项命中率分别达到46.4%、37.4%和85.1%。作为精英级无球射手，其绕掩护进攻使用率（Synergy数据）位列联盟第99百分位——出手迅捷、出手点高，在接球投篮、定点投射和移动三分方面游刃有余。凭借投射威胁，他总能以精准时机和出色身体控制完成反跑空切。决策能力极强——大四赛季失误率仅7.4%，兼具串联传球与明智判断。在役期间即入选康大"哈士奇荣誉殿堂"。但运动能力短板显著——缺乏脚步速度、横向移动能力和爆发力。大四赛季快攻命中率仅32.5%，整个赛季仅有8次持球突破。四年大学累计仅得到8次单打得分。匿名对手教练对其防守表现提出严厉批评。与萨姆·豪瑟几乎完全对标（赤脚身高同为6英尺6.75英寸，卡拉班6英尺11英寸的臂展略占优势）。作为即插即用的空间型四号位，预计在首轮末至次轮区间被选中。

name: Hannes Steinbach
profile_text: Hannes Steinbach led all of NCAA Division I in rebounding (11.8 RPG) as a true freshman at Washington, establishing himself as arguably the best pure center in the 2026 class. Averaged 18.5 PPG on 57.7% FG with 22 double-doubles (led nation), 4.2 offensive rebounds per game, and 1.2 BPG. Elite interior finisher at 67% at the rim with soft hands, excellent post footwork, and crafty finishes. Hard screen-setter who dives aggressively in pick-and-roll. Plays with an immovable 248-pound base and relentless motor — described by his coach as an elite teammate. Before Washington, he led Germany to its first-ever U18 EuroBasket gold (2024) and U19 World Cup silver (2025), earning All-Star Five honors at both tournaments. The primary concerns are rim protection (3.9% block rate is low for a center) and shooting — took only 53 total threes (34%) and form is inconsistent. Below-average vertical explosion with only 27 dunks in 30 games. Standing reach ranks just 19th percentile among NBA combine centers. Tweener concerns — undersized height for a center (57th percentile), may not have lateral quickness for full-time PF. Compares to Domantas Sabonis or Isaiah Hartenstein — high-feel, physical big who rebounds and passes at a high level. Late lottery to mid-first round.
profile_text_cn: 汉内斯·施泰因巴赫在华盛顿大学作为真正的大一新生，以场均11.8个篮板领跑全美NCAA一级联赛，确立了自己作为2026届选秀中最佳纯正中锋的地位。他场均得到18.5分，投篮命中率57.7%，贡献22次两双（全美第一），场均4.2个进攻篮板，以及1.2次盖帽。他是精英级别的内线终结者，在篮下命中率高达67%，拥有柔和的手感、出色的低位脚步和巧妙的终结技巧。他是一名强硬的掩护者，在挡拆中侵略性十足地顺下。他拥有248磅的稳固下盘和永不停歇的拼劲——被教练形容为精英级别的队友。在加盟华盛顿大学之前，他带领德国队夺得了队史首枚U18欧锦赛金牌（2024年）和U19世界杯银牌（2025年），并在两项赛事中均入选最佳阵容。主要担忧在于护框能力（3.9%的盖帽率对于中锋来说偏低）和投射——整个赛季仅出手53次三分球（命中率34%），且投篮姿势不稳定。他的垂直爆发力低于平均水平，30场比赛中仅有27次扣篮。站立摸高在NBA联合试训中锋中仅排在第19百分位。存在位置模糊的隐患——作为中锋身高不足（第57百分位），可能也不具备全职大前锋所需的横向移动速度。模板可参考多曼塔斯·萨博尼斯或以赛亚·哈尔滕施泰因——球感出色、身体强壮、篮板和传球能力出众的内线。预计选秀顺位为乐透末段至首轮中段。

name: Henri Veesaar
profile_text: Henri Veesaar is a modern stretch-five out of North Carolina who shot 42.6% from three as a junior — a massive breakout season after transferring from Arizona and more than doubling his scoring to 17.0 PPG. Averaged 8.7 RPG, 2.1 APG, and 1.2 BPG on an ultra-efficient 60.8% FG. Elite floor-spacer for a true 7-footer — hit 53% on unguarded catch-and-shoot threes and 39% on pick-and-pop attempts with clean mechanics and confident trigger. Efficient interior scorer at nearly 75% at the rim with effective mix of soft touch (hooks, floaters) and powerful finishing (58 dunks). Quick-decision passer (2.1 APG, 13.6 AST%) reflecting his Real Madrid youth academy roots. Fluid mover for his size who plays with consistent effort across 30+ minutes. The defensive concerns are significant — blocked just 1.2 shots per game (3.8% block rate), opponents shot 51% at the rim against him, and he lacks elite verticality to deter shots. Lean 227-pound frame gets moved by stronger bigs. Free throw shooting (61.5%) raises sustainability questions about the three-point percentage. Not a face-up threat or shot creator. Compares to Kelly Olynyk at best or Frank Kaminsky at worst — skilled offensive big with defensive limitations. Late first to early second round.
profile_text_cn: 亨利·维萨尔是来自北卡罗来纳大学的现代空间型五号位，大三赛季三分命中率高达42.6%——从亚利桑那大学转学后迎来爆发赛季，场均得分翻倍至17.0分。场均贡献8.7篮板、2.1助攻、1.2盖帽，投篮命中率高达60.8%。作为真正的七尺长人，他是精英级别的空间型内线——无人防守的接球投三分命中率达53%，挡拆外弹三分命中率39%，出手动作干净利落且出手果断。近筐终结效率惊人，篮下命中率接近75%，兼具柔和手感（勾手、抛投）与强力终结（58次扣篮）。传球决策迅速（场均2.1助攻，助攻率13.6%），尽显皇马青训体系培养的功底。体型移动流畅，场均30+分钟出场时间始终保持稳定拼劲。防守端隐患显著——场均仅1.2次封盖（盖帽率3.8%），对手在他防守下篮下命中率达51%，缺乏顶级弹跳威慑力。227磅的瘦削体型面对强力内线时会被顶开。罚球命中率（61.5%）引发对其三分命中率可持续性的质疑。不具备面筐进攻威胁或自主创造得分能力。最佳模板为凯利·奥利尼克，最差模板为弗兰克·卡明斯基——技术型进攻内线但防守存在短板。预计首轮末至次轮初被选中。
polishedReason: 大三即战力空间五号位

name: Sergio de Larrea
profile_text: Sergio de Larrea is a tall, high-IQ Spanish combo guard with legitimate NBA size at 6-foot-7 and a 6-foot-9 wingspan — rare dimensions for a lead ball-handler. Averaged 9.7 PPG, 3.0 RPG, and 3.7 APG in the Spanish ACB and EuroLeague for Valencia Basket, shooting 40.7% from three and 83.3% from the line across 60+ professional games. Described as having an old man's game with veteran pace — patiently manipulates pick-and-roll defenses, consistently makes the correct read, and connects offense with skip passes through tight windows. Legitimate floor-spacer who hit 47.5% on catch-and-shoot triples. Extensive EuroLeague experience (34 career appearances) lowers developmental risk. The primary concern is athletic burst — lacks a lightning first step, vertical pop, or suddenness, which limits rim finishing (54.5% on layups) and foul-drawing. Concerning 19.5% turnover rate on just 22.2% usage for a low-volume player. Under 26% on two-point jumpers. Projects more as a smart positional defender than a disruptive stopper. Compares internationally to a taller Malcolm Brogdon or Bogdan Bogdanović — steady, high-IQ guard who wins with feel and craft rather than athleticism. Candidate for draft-and-stash with late first to early second round value.
profile_text_cn: 塞尔吉奥·德·拉雷亚是一名身材高大、球商出众的西班牙双能卫，拥有6英尺7英寸（约2.01米）的标准NBA身高和6英尺9英寸（约2.06米）的臂展——对于一名持球核心后卫而言，这是罕见的身体条件。他在西班牙ACB联赛和欧洲联赛中为瓦伦西亚篮球俱乐部效力，场均贡献9.7分、3.0个篮板和3.7次助攻，在超过60场职业比赛中三分命中率40.7%，罚球命中率83.3%。他被形容为拥有"老将式"的比赛风格，节奏沉稳——耐心操纵挡拆防守，持续做出正确判断，并通过穿越狭小空间的横传球串联进攻。作为可靠的场上空间点，他的接球投篮三分命中率高达47.5%。丰富的欧洲联赛经验（34次出场）降低了培养风险。主要短板在于运动爆发力——缺乏闪电般的第一步、弹跳爆发力或突然性，这限制了其篮下终结能力（上篮命中率54.5%）和造犯规能力。在仅22.2%的使用率下，19.5%的失误率对于一名低球权球员来说令人担忧。两分跳投命中率不足26%。在防守端，他更可能成为一名聪明的对位防守者，而非破坏性的封锁者。国际球员模板可类比更高大的马尔科姆·布罗格登或博格丹·博格达诺维奇——稳健、高球商的后卫，依靠比赛感觉和技术而非运动能力取胜。具备首轮末至次轮初的选秀后留洋培养价值。
polishedReason: 欧洲联赛即战力高球商

name: Dailyn Swain
profile_text: Dailyn Swain is the most efficient isolation scorer in the country among high-volume wings — a slashing savant out of Texas who scored 1.2 PPP in isolation on 54% shooting. Averaged 17.3 PPG, 7.5 RPG, 3.6 APG, and 1.6 SPG on 54.2% FG while earning All-SEC Second Team honors and leading Texas to the Sweet 16. Elite rim pressure — 61.8% shooting on drives, 63% at the rim (236 attempts), with an astonishing 82% of rim attempts unassisted (99th percentile nationally). Guard-level ball-handling for his size — strings together crossovers, spins, and change-of-pace moves to beat defenders off the dribble. Active defensive playmaker with a 6-foot-10 wingspan and strong positional rebounding (13.6% rebound rate). Operated effectively as a pick-and-roll ball-handler (0.95 PPP on 163 possessions). The swing skill is shooting — career 3PT progression improved from ~15% to ~25% to 34.4% at Texas, but still on low volume (2.6 attempts/game) with slow, stiff mechanics that may need an overhaul. Defenders routinely sag off him. Turnovers are a concern (2.7 per game, 1.3 AST/TO ratio). Defensive consistency slipped with heavier offensive workload. Compares to Herb Jones — defensive versatility, secondary creation, and emerging shooting. Mid-to-late first round with starter upside if the jumper develops.
profile_text_cn: 戴林·斯温是全美高产侧翼中最有效率的单打得分手——这位来自德克萨斯州的突破专家，在单打中每回合得到1.2分，命中率高达54%。他场均贡献17.3分、7.5篮板、3.6助攻和1.6抢断，投篮命中率54.2%，入选SEC联盟最佳阵容二阵，并带领德克萨斯大学闯入NCAA甜蜜16强。他拥有顶级的篮下压迫力——突破上篮命中率61.8%，篮下终结命中率63%（共236次出手），其中高达82%的篮下出手为无助攻进球（全国第99百分位）。对于他的体型而言，他具备后卫级别的控球能力——能连续使用交叉步、转身和变速变向动作，在运球中摆脱防守者。他是一名活跃的防守组织者，臂展达到6英尺10英寸，并展现出强劲的锋线篮板能力（篮板率13.6%）。作为挡拆持球人，他同样高效（163个回合中每回合得到0.95分）。他的关键技能在于投篮——三分命中率从早期的约15%提升至约25%，再到德克萨斯大学时期的34.4%，但出手次数仍然偏低（场均2.6次），且投篮动作缓慢僵硬，可能需要彻底调整。防守者经常放他一步。失误问题值得关注（场均2.7次失误，助攻失误比1.3）。随着进攻负担加重，他的防守稳定性有所下滑。模板为赫伯特·琼斯——防守全面性、次要组织能力以及逐渐成型的投篮。如果跳投能够开发出来，他具备中后段首轮秀的潜力，并拥有首发球员的上限。

name: Ebuka Okorie
profile_text: Ebuka Okorie is arguably the best driving guard in the 2026 class — a 19-year-old Stanford freshman who took an incredible 250 shots at the rim (No. 1 among guard prospects), with 50% of total shot attempts coming at the rim (99th percentile). Averaged 23.2 PPG, 3.6 RPG, 3.6 APG, and 1.6 SPG on 35.1 MPG while shooting 46.5% FG / 35.4% 3PT (5.7 attempts/game) / 83.2% FT. Elite self-creation — an astonishing 89% of rim attempts were unassisted. Possesses blistering straight-line speed, a lightning-quick first step, exceptional acceleration/deceleration, and bendy body control to slither through tight gaps. Elite ball security — just 8.7% turnover rate on a massive 31.0% usage rate (97th percentile in Creation Turnover %). Plus 6-foot-7.75 wingspan gives him a +6.5-inch differential — elite length for his height. Active defensive hands (1.6 SPG, 2.7% steal rate). The primary concerns are size (6-foot-1.25, 186 lbs makes him undersized), playmaking vision (only 3.6 APG, wired to score first), and rim finishing efficiency (just 54% at the rim despite elite volume). Stanford's weak schedule (9th in ACC, no postseason) raises competition-level questions. Compares to Dennis Schröder — lightning-quick scoring spark who can run a second unit from day one. Mid-to-late first round sleeper.
profile_text_cn: 埃布卡·奥科里堪称2026届最出色的突破型后卫——这位19岁的斯坦福大学新生，本赛季共完成惊人的250次篮下出手（后卫新秀中排名第一），其中50%的投篮来自篮下（百分位排名第99）。场均出战35.1分钟，贡献23.2分、3.6篮板、3.6助攻和1.6抢断，投篮命中率46.5%，三分命中率35.4%（场均出手5.7次），罚球命中率83.2%。具备顶级的自主进攻能力——高达89%的篮下出手均为非助攻得分。他拥有惊人的直线冲刺速度、闪电般的第一步启动、出色的加速/减速控制能力，以及柔韧的身体控制力，能像蛇一样钻过狭小防守缝隙。控球安全性极佳——在31.0%的超高使用率下，失误率仅为8.7%（创造失误率百分位排名第97）。6英尺7.75英寸（约202.6厘米）的臂展带来+6.5英寸（约16.5厘米）的臂展优势，在同身高球员中属于顶级长臂。防守端手部活跃（场均1.6抢断，抢断率2.7%）。主要短板在于体型（6英尺1.25英寸/约186.7厘米，186磅/约84.4公斤，属于矮个后卫）、组织视野（场均仅3.6助攻，天生得分优先型打法）以及篮下终结效率（尽管产量顶级，但篮下命中率仅54%）。斯坦福大学赛程强度偏弱（ACC联盟第9名，未进季后赛），也引发对其竞争水平的质疑。模板参考丹尼斯·施罗德——闪电般快速的得分尖刀，从第一天起就能胜任第二阵容指挥官。预计在首轮中后段被选中的潜力股。

name: Allen Graves
profile_text: Allen Graves is the ultimate analytics darling of the 2026 class — a redshirt freshman at Santa Clara who finished 6th nationally in Box Plus-Minus behind only lottery talents Cameron Boozer, Yaxel Lendeborg, and Caleb Wilson. Averaged 11.8 PPG, 6.5 RPG (2.8 offensive), 1.9 SPG, and 0.9 BPG in just 22.6 MPG while shooting 51.2% FG / 41.3% 3PT / 75.0% FT. Won WCC Freshman of the Year, Sixth Man of the Year, and First Team All-WCC. Elite defensive instincts — often compared to a free safety reading the quarterback, with arguably the best hands in the class. No other player in men's college basketball matched his steal rate (4.9%) and block rate (4.9%) simultaneously. Advanced passing feel from his point guard roots before a late growth spurt. Shot better on guarded threes (44%) than unguarded (39%). Physical screener who averaged 11.5 rebounds per 40 minutes. The athletic testing was poor — bottom five in lane agility, shuttle run, and three-quarter sprint at the Combine. 27.5-inch standing vertical and 34-inch max vertical. Struggles finishing against length (51.7% on layups). On-ball defense graded poorly per Synergy with high foul rate. WCC competition level raises translation risk. Compares to Robert Covington — three-and-D forward with plus passing feel and defensive disruption. Mid-first to early second round.
profile_text_cn: 艾伦·格雷夫斯是2026届选秀中数据分析最钟爱的球员——这位圣克拉拉大学的红衫大一新生，在正负值（Box Plus-Minus）排名中高居全美第六，仅次于乐透级天才卡梅隆·布泽尔、亚克塞尔·伦德伯格和凯莱布·威尔逊。他场均仅出战22.6分钟，贡献11.8分、6.5个篮板（其中2.8个进攻篮板）、1.9次抢断和0.9次盖帽，投篮命中率51.2%、三分命中率41.3%、罚球命中率75.0%。他包揽了WCC联盟最佳新人、最佳第六人以及最佳阵容一阵的荣誉。防守本能堪称精英——常被比作阅读四分卫的自由安全卫，拥有本届选秀中最顶尖的抢断手感。在NCAA一级联赛中，没有其他球员能同时达到他4.9%的抢断率和4.9%的盖帽率。得益于早期控卫出身（后经历身高暴涨），他具备出色的传球意识。他在受干扰三分命中率（44%）甚至高于空位三分（39%）。作为身体对抗型掩护者，他每40分钟能抢下11.5个篮板。但体测表现糟糕——联合试训中，他的底线折返跑、穿梭跑和四分之三场冲刺均位列倒数前五。站立摸高27.5英寸，最大弹跳34英寸。面对长人时终结能力不足（上篮命中率仅51.7%）。根据Synergy数据，他的单防评级较低且犯规率偏高。WCC联盟的竞争水平也增加了其表现转化的风险。模板为罗伯特·科温顿——具备额外传球意识和防守破坏力的3D前锋。预计顺位：首轮末至次轮初。

name: Jaylen Harrell
profile_text: Jaylen Harrell is a former four-star recruit and two-time Massachusetts Gatorade Player of the Year (2024, 2025) who averaged 22.1 PPG, 8.5 RPG, and 7.2 APG as a high school senior at CATS Academy. Originally committed to Providence where he played just six games before a season-ending injury (3.7 PPG in 9.7 MPG). Transferred to Washington State in April 2026. Possesses good positional size at 6-foot-5 with a plus-4-inch wingspan (6-foot-9) and a strong 210-pound frame. His mid-range pull-up game is his best offensive weapon, and he has shown flashes as a passer and off-ball cutter. The primary areas for development are foot speed/lateral quickness for NBA defense, three-point consistency (shot just 27.3% from three in limited college action, 32.6% in EYBL), and overall conditioning. Durability is a major question after the lost freshman season. Harrell is NOT a 2026 draft prospect — he will need a healthy, productive season at Washington State to build any NBA buzz, most realistically targeting the 2027 or 2028 draft. Included here as a future-prospect placeholder.
profile_text_cn: 杰伦·哈雷尔曾是一名四星高中生，两次当选马萨诸塞州佳得乐年度最佳球员（2024年、2025年）。在CATS学院读高四时，他场均贡献22.1分、8.5个篮板和7.2次助攻。他最初承诺加盟普罗维登斯大学，但因赛季报销的伤病仅出战6场比赛（场均9.7分钟得3.7分）。2026年4月，他转学至华盛顿州立大学。哈雷尔拥有出色的位置体型——身高6英尺5英寸（约1.96米），臂展达到6英尺9英寸（约2.06米），比身高多出4英寸，同时具备210磅（约95公斤）的强壮体格。他的中距离急停跳投是最强进攻武器，在传球和无球切入方面也偶有闪光。主要提升方向包括：NBA级别的防守脚步速度/横向移动能力、三分球稳定性（大学有限出场中三分命中率仅27.3%，EYBL联赛为32.6%），以及整体体能状态。因大一赛季报销，他的耐久性存在重大疑问。哈雷尔并非2026年选秀候选人——他需要在华盛顿州立大学打出一个健康且高效的赛季才能积累NBA关注度，最现实的目标是瞄准2027年或2028年选秀。此处将其列为未来潜力球员的占位符。

name: Tyran Stokes
profile_text: Tyran Stokes is the consensus No. 1 high school recruit in the 2026 class and the early favorite for the No. 1 overall pick in the 2027 NBA Draft. Committed to Kansas over Kentucky and Oregon. Averaged 31.0 PPG, 13.0 RPG, 6.0 APG, and 4.0 SPG as a high school senior at Rainier Beach (Seattle) while shooting 53% FG and 41% 3PT. Physically imposing at 6-foot-7, 240 pounds — his high school coach compared his physicality to a young LeBron James, noting he was heavier and stronger than LeBron at the same age. Elite explosive athlete with a reported 7-foot wingspan who regularly throws down 7-8 dunks per game. His passing is described as Magic Johnson-esque — his coach famously called him Magic Johnson with a jump shot. Jordan Brand Classic MVP (29 pts, 8 reb, 7 ast, 3 blk). Nike Hoop Summit standout. Former football player (DE/LB) who carries that physical mentality to the court. Won gold with USA Basketball at the U19 World Cup. Areas to develop: consistent motor (can be nonchalant with the ball), decision-making (EYBL 3.8 AST to 3.6 TOV), and proving shooting consistency beyond one season. Projects as a generational two-way wing with franchise-player upside. NOT in the 2026 draft — will be a one-and-done at Kansas, targeting the 2027 NBA Draft as the presumptive No. 1 pick.
profile_text_cn: 泰兰·斯托克斯是2026届公认的全美第一高中生，也是2027年NBA选秀状元的热门人选。他承诺加盟堪萨斯大学，拒绝了肯塔基和俄勒冈的邀请。在雷尼尔海滩高中（西雅图）的高四赛季，他场均贡献31.0分、13.0篮板、6.0助攻和4.0抢断，投篮命中率53%，三分命中率41%。身高6英尺7英寸（约2.01米）、体重240磅（约109公斤）的他拥有极具压迫感的身体条件——他的高中教练将其对抗能力比作年轻时的勒布朗·詹姆斯，并指出他在同龄时比詹姆斯更重、更强壮。作为爆发力惊人的精英级运动健将，他拥有报道中7英尺（约2.13米）的臂展，场均能完成7-8次扣篮。他的传球被形容为魔术师约翰逊级别——教练曾盛赞他是"会投篮的魔术师约翰逊"。他荣膺乔丹品牌经典赛MVP（29分、8篮板、7助攻、3盖帽），并在耐克篮球峰会上大放异彩。作为前橄榄球运动员（防守端锋/线卫），他将那种身体对抗的强硬心态带到了篮球场上。他曾随美国男篮夺得U19世界杯金牌。需要提升的方面：保持稳定的比赛专注度（持球时偶尔漫不经心）、决策能力（EYBL联赛场均3.8助攻对3.6失误），以及证明自己并非赛季三分手感昙花一现。他被视为具备划时代意义的双向侧翼球员，拥有建队核心级别的上限。他并不参加2026年选秀——将在堪萨斯大学打完大一后直接参选，目标锁定2027年NBA选秀的状元位置。

name: Zuby Ejiofor
profile_text_cn: 祖比·埃吉奥福是一名高能量、防守优先的内线球员。身高6尺8寸、臂展7尺2寸，凭借精英级的拼劲和身体对抗能力，能换防1到5号位。大四赛季在圣约翰大学场均16.3分7.3篮板3.5助攻2.2盖帽，当选大东联盟年度最佳球员兼最佳防守球员。进攻端以攻框和进攻篮板为主，生涯场均2.7个前场篮板，传球能力从1.6次提升至3.5次助攻。三分投射偏弱（生涯27.7%），但作为即插即用型替补内线，其防守多功能性和高下限使其成为安全的选择。

name: Tarris Reed Jr.
profile_text_cn: 塔里斯·里德二世是本届选秀最全面的传统中锋。身高6尺10寸、体重264磅、臂展7尺4.25寸，具备NBA级别的内线体型。大四赛季在康涅狄格大学场均14.7分9.0篮板2.0盖帽，投篮命中率60.7%。在NCAA锦标赛中打出31分27篮板的历史级表现——自1968年埃尔文·海耶斯以来首场30+25的锦标赛数据。精英级篮板手和护框者，7尺4寸臂展位列本届前十。传球能力被低估（2.3助攻），能担任高位策应枢纽。红标：完全无三分投射，罚球仅62%，进攻端局限于禁区。适合作为传统内线轮换，提供篮板保护和禁区终结。

name: Joshua Jefferson
profile_text_cn: 约书亚·杰弗森是2026届最独特全面的前锋之一。身高6尺9寸、体重246磅，大四赛季在爱荷华州立场均16.4分7.4篮板4.8助攻1.6抢断，三分命中率34.5%。入选全美最佳阵容——爱荷华州立自2016年乔治斯·尼昂以来首人。大十二联盟历史上首位在单赛季多次砍下三双的球员，也是首位单赛季450+分250+篮板100+助攻70+抢断的球员。前锋中助攻率排名全国第三（28%），篮球智商极高。运动能力非精英级别，臂展6尺10.75寸在NBA四号位偏短，但投射、传球、篮板三位一体的技能包使其成为高下限的安全选择。
